title: v4.9.3 вАФ Login & Polish
message:
Improved sign-in options and smoother settings.

вАҐ Email/password sign-in and sign-up added
вАҐ Guest mode вАФ play without an account
вАҐ Google sign-in uses redirect instead of popup
вАҐ QR code for your friend code вАФ easier adding
вАҐ Username save button disabled when nothing changed
вАҐ Cleaner backdrop blur on all overlays
вАҐ Background scroll locked while settings are open
вАҐ Various UI polish fixes
